title: Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design - Student Opinions
content:
Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design - Student Opinions

I am a 1st year student at Istanbul Esenyurt University, Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design. Interior Architecture and Environmental Design was my only goal in my university preferences. My motto I believed in while preparing for the department; "If you are doing a job you love in life, you are not considered to have worked even one day". The field of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design is a field where integrated design, technology and innovative approaches are important, intertwined with art and aiming to integrate with the contemporary world by preserving its own cultural values. I aim to rise in this field with the knowledge and experience I will gain from IESU's Interior Architecture and Environmental Design department.

Aysu EĞİLMEZ

Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design

This content was updated on 08/09/2024.
